summary:
DOMESTIC AND INTERNATIONAL THREATS: Brandon details a series of visions regarding orchestrated plots and infiltrations targeting major locations. In Honolulu, Hawaii, a significant plan is being formulated near high-end retail shops, driven by an individual who is being pressured into action. In Orlando, a plot aims to instill fear at a prominent theme park associated with a mouse, a symbol of freedom and tourism. This involves utilizing badges to bypass security and infiltrating staff near the Tron ride. Brandon warns against stereotyping based on dark skin or Arab descent, indicating that the threat involves an unexpected demographic of the Muslim faith. He mentions the word Mecca and a timeline around Ramadan. Furthermore, Brandon describes deep infiltrations at all levels, including malls and the government, where operatives are shredding evidence and whitewashing computer mainframes to cover their tracks. He states that entities within the NSA, as well as the French and Canadian governments, are cooperating without resistance to ultimately impose Sharia law.

CORRECTION AND SHAKING IN THE CHURCH: Brandon issues a stern warning about profound heresy and pride within modern religious institutions. He declares that the church has become indistinguishable from the world, filled with leaders who have exalted themselves and clung to worldly associations rather than maintaining purity and holiness. A great shaking and severe correction are imminent for these institutions and auditoriums. To illustrate this necessary correction, Brandon uses the analogy of a horse. A broken, pliable horse requires only a gentle tug to stay on track, whereas a rebellious, off-track horse demands a harsh yank to be brought back into alignment. He emphasizes that true repentance requires turning away from worldly compromise, warning that many who publicly claim to serve God are entirely unknown to Him because their hearts remain distant.

THE REMNANT AND UPCOMING REVIVAL: Brandon speaks of a small, faithful remnant that has successfully separated itself from worldly influences and is prepared for an outpouring of divine glory. While comparing the current state of rebellion to the Israelites worshiping the golden calf, he affirms that God will use this dedicated remnant to spark a massive revival. During this sequence, Brandon also mentions South Korea, indicating that the region will face intense persecution before turning a new page. He explains that God is actively removing and humbling prideful figures while exalting those who have been broken and cultivated deep spiritual roots. This upcoming period will feature divine manifestations, healing, and great signs and wonders flowing through these humble individuals, who will act purely as funnels to direct all glory back to God.

FALSE PROPHETS AND SPIRITUAL DISCERNMENT: Brandon cautions against a surge of false prophets who deliver messages designed to please audiences for financial gain. He compares these individuals to twigs swaying back and forth to appease the masses and secure monetary support. Drawing a parallel to the days of Jeremiah, Brandon stresses the absolute necessity of spiritual discernment, urging individuals to test the spirits and judge the prophetic words they hear. He instructs people to seek a deeper personal relationship with God through prayer and scripture rather than relying on external voices. Finally, Brandon declares that the era of the Hollywood celebrity preacher is over, as God refuses to share His glory. Instead, there will be an accelerated rise of unknown, cultivated voices and new broadcast stations that have developed deep roots and genuine fruitfulness.
